task:
/home/user/Documents/scene.ply is an ASCII PLY with 2500 points: ~1500 points forming a gently-sloped ground plane (Z near 0-1) and ~1000 elevated points representing objects above the ground (Z in roughly 3-8).

Run the CSF (Cloth Simulation Filter) ground/non-ground segmentation with default parameters, then export only the ground-points cloud as an ASCII PLY at /home/user/Documents/ground.ply. Do not export the off-ground cloud and do not export the original scene. The ground output must have between 1000 and 2000 points and every point must lie within Z in [-1, 2.5].
